DatabaseInput.Description: Glue catalog for CloudFront and S3 access logs
DatabaseInput.Name: serverlessappfrontend_us_east_1_access_logs

Properties.Description: Total bytes transferred per edge location
Properties.Name: CloudFront - Bandwidth by Edge Location
Properties.QueryString:
SELECT x_edge_location, COUNT(*) as requests,
       SUM(CAST(sc_bytes AS bigint)) as bytes_out,
       SUM(CAST(cs_bytes AS bigint)) as bytes_in
FROM cloudfront_logs
GROUP BY x_edge_location
ORDER BY bytes_out DESC
LIMIT 25

Properties.Description: Request counts and percentages by edge result type (Hit/Miss/Error)
Properties.Name: CloudFront - Cache Hit Ratio
Properties.QueryString:
SELECT x_edge_result_type, COUNT(*) as request_count,
       ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 2) as pct
FROM cloudfront_logs
GROUP BY x_edge_result_type
ORDER BY request_count DESC

Properties.Description: Recent 4xx/5xx error responses with client and edge details
Properties.Name: CloudFront - Error Responses
Properties.QueryString:
SELECT log_date, log_time, c_ip, cs_method, cs_uri_stem, sc_status,
       x_edge_result_type, x_edge_detailed_result_type
FROM cloudfront_logs
WHERE sc_status LIKE '4%' OR sc_status LIKE '5%'
ORDER BY log_date DESC, log_time DESC
LIMIT 50

Properties.Description: Highest-traffic client IPs with error counts
Properties.Name: CloudFront - Top Client IPs
Properties.QueryString:
SELECT c_ip, COUNT(*) as request_count,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN sc_status LIKE '4%' OR sc_status LIKE '5%' THEN 1 END) as errors
FROM cloudfront_logs
GROUP BY c_ip
ORDER BY request_count DESC
LIMIT 25

Properties.Description: Most frequently requested URIs with error counts
Properties.Name: CloudFront - Top Requested URIs
Properties.QueryString:
SELECT cs_uri_stem, cs_method,
       COUNT(*) as request_count,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN sc_status LIKE '4%' OR sc_status LIKE '5%' THEN 1 END) as errors
FROM cloudfront_logs
GROUP BY cs_uri_stem, cs_method
ORDER BY request_count DESC
LIMIT 25

Properties.Description: /opt/awscli/aws
KMS key for ServerlessAppFrontend-us-east-1 S3 bucket and log groups

rules_to_suppress.reason: RUM requires unauthenticated guest credentials for anonymous browser telemetry

Properties.Description: Guest role assumed by browser RUM clients for ServerlessAppFrontend-us-east-1-rum
Recent 403 AccessDenied responses with requester and operation details
Properties.Name: S3 - Access Denied (403)
Properties.QueryString:
SELECT request_datetime, remote_ip, requester, operation, key,
       request_uri, error_code
FROM s3_access_logs
WHERE http_status = '403'
ORDER BY request_datetime DESC
LIMIT 50

Properties.Description: Recent failed S3 requests with error details
Properties.Name: S3 - Error Requests
Properties.QueryString:
SELECT request_datetime, remote_ip, requester, operation, key,
       request_uri, http_status, error_code
FROM s3_access_logs
WHERE http_status NOT IN ('200', '204', '206', '304', '-')
ORDER BY request_datetime DESC
LIMIT 50

Properties.Description: Who read which object (GET.OBJECT operations) with status and bytes
Properties.Name: S3 - Object Read Audit
Properties.QueryString:
SELECT request_datetime, remote_ip, requester, key,
       http_status, bytes_sent, user_agent
FROM s3_access_logs
WHERE operation LIKE '%GET.OBJECT%'
ORDER BY request_datetime DESC
LIMIT 100

Properties.Description: Highest-latency S3 requests by total_time (ms)
Properties.Name: S3 - Slow Requests
Properties.QueryString:
SELECT request_datetime, remote_ip, operation, key, http_status,
       total_time, turn_around_time, bytes_sent
FROM s3_access_logs
WHERE total_time != '-'
ORDER BY CAST(total_time AS integer) DESC
LIMIT 50

Properties.Description: Most common S3 operations with error counts
Properties.Name: S3 - Top Operations
Properties.QueryString:
SELECT operation, COUNT(*) as op_count,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN http_status NOT IN ('200','204','206','304') THEN 1 END) as errors
FROM s3_access_logs
GROUP BY operation
ORDER BY op_count DESC
LIMIT 25

Properties.Description: Highest-traffic S3 requesters with error counts
Properties.Name: S3 - Top Requesters
Properties.QueryString:
SELECT remote_ip, requester, COUNT(*) as request_count,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN http_status NOT IN ('200','204','206','304') THEN 1 END) as errors
FROM s3_access_logs
GROUP BY remote_ip, requester
ORDER BY request_count DESC
LIMIT 25

ResponseHeadersPolicyConfig.Comment: Security headers for the Serverless App frontend (managed SECURITY_HEADERS + HSTS + CSP)
ResponseHeadersPolicyConfig.Name: ServerlessAppFrontend-us-east-1-security-headers

Fn::Join: .execute-api.us-east-1.amazonaws.com; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

Properties.Description: BLOCK actions grouped by client country (last 30 days)
Properties.Name: WAF Regional - Blocked by Country
Properties.QueryString:
SELECT httprequest.country, COUNT(*) AS block_count
FROM waf_regional_logs
WHERE action = 'BLOCK'
  AND log_time >= date_format(current_timestamp - interval '30' day, '%Y/%m/%d')
GROUP BY httprequest.country
ORDER BY block_count DESC
LIMIT 25

Properties.Description: Most recent BLOCK actions (last 30 days) with client IP, country, URI, and terminating rule
Properties.Name: WAF Regional - Recent Blocked Requests
Properties.QueryString:
SELECT from_unixtime(timestamp / 1000) AS request_time,
       httprequest.clientip, httprequest.country, httprequest.uri,
       terminatingruleid
FROM waf_regional_logs
WHERE action = 'BLOCK'
  AND log_time >= date_format(current_timestamp - interval '30' day, '%Y/%m/%d')
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 50

Properties.Description: Client IPs with the most BLOCK actions (last 30 days)
Properties.Name: WAF Regional - Top Blocked Client IPs
Properties.QueryString:
SELECT httprequest.clientip, httprequest.country, COUNT(*) AS block_count
FROM waf_regional_logs
WHERE action = 'BLOCK'
  AND log_time >= date_format(current_timestamp - interval '30' day, '%Y/%m/%d')
GROUP BY httprequest.clientip, httprequest.country
ORDER BY block_count DESC
LIMIT 25

Properties.Description: Which rules terminated the most requests (last 30 days)
Properties.Name: WAF Regional - Top Terminating Rules
Properties.QueryString:
SELECT terminatingruleid, action, COUNT(*) AS hit_count
FROM waf_regional_logs
WHERE log_time >= date_format(current_timestamp - interval '30' day, '%Y/%m/%d')
GROUP BY terminatingruleid, action
ORDER BY hit_count DESC
LIMIT 25

Properties.Description: BLOCK actions grouped by client country (last 30 days)
Properties.Name: WAF CloudFront - Blocked by Country
Properties.QueryString:
SELECT httprequest.country, COUNT(*) AS block_count
FROM waf_cloudfront_logs
WHERE action = 'BLOCK'
  AND log_time >= date_format(current_timestamp - interval '30' day, '%Y/%m/%d')
GROUP BY httprequest.country
ORDER BY block_count DESC
LIMIT 25

Properties.Description: Most recent BLOCK actions (last 30 days) with client IP, country, URI, and terminating rule
Properties.Name: WAF CloudFront - Recent Blocked Requests
Properties.QueryString:
SELECT from_unixtime(timestamp / 1000) AS request_time,
       httprequest.clientip, httprequest.country, httprequest.uri,
       terminatingruleid
FROM waf_cloudfront_logs
WHERE action = 'BLOCK'
  AND log_time >= date_format(current_timestamp - interval '30' day, '%Y/%m/%d')
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 50

Properties.Description: Client IPs with the most BLOCK actions (last 30 days)
Properties.Name: WAF CloudFront - Top Blocked Client IPs
Properties.QueryString:
SELECT httprequest.clientip, httprequest.country, COUNT(*) AS block_count
FROM waf_cloudfront_logs
WHERE action = 'BLOCK'
  AND log_time >= date_format(current_timestamp - interval '30' day, '%Y/%m/%d')
GROUP BY httprequest.clientip, httprequest.country
ORDER BY block_count DESC
LIMIT 25

Properties.Description: Which rules terminated the most requests (last 30 days)
Properties.Name: WAF CloudFront - Top Terminating Rules
Properties.QueryString:
SELECT terminatingruleid, action, COUNT(*) AS hit_count
FROM waf_cloudfront_logs
WHERE log_time >= date_format(current_timestamp - interval '30' day, '%Y/%m/%d')
GROUP BY terminatingruleid, action
ORDER BY hit_count DESC
LIMIT 25
